stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
(For this question use VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017). You are planning a route from Albstadt Degerfeld (EDSA) (N48°15' E009°04') to Laupheim (ETHL) (N48°13' E009°55'). What are the callsign and frequency of the Flight Information Services for this route?

options.a: Degerfeld Information 125.10 MHz and Langen Information 128.95 MHZ.
options.b: Degerfeld Information 125.10 MHz and Laupheim Information 122.10 MHz.
options.c: Langen Information 128.95 MHz, Munchen Information 126.95 MHz, and Erbach Information 118.27 MHz.
options.d: Langen Information 128.95 MHz and Munchen Information 126.95 MHz.
